_comment: Dedicated profile for the darkmux self-review CI workflow (.github/workflows/darkmux-review.yml). Pinned via DARKMUX_PROFILES so the review dispatch always uses qwen3.6-35b-a3b regardless of the laptop's active profile — no global state change. The model must be available in the runner's LMStudio (see .github/DARKMUX_REVIEW_RUNNER.md).

darkmux-review.description: darkmux self-review CI — qwen3.6-35b-a3b on the laptop runner
